**Title**: States' total external debt outstanding  
**One-line**: Total external debt outstanding against each State / UT, as reported in the Rajya Sabha Session 259 Unstarred Question 1480 answer (≈ Jul-Aug 2023).  
**Source artifact last modified**: 2026-05-16 (auto-generated)

## Definition

Total external debt outstanding against each State / UT, as reported in the Rajya Sabha Session 259 Unstarred Question 1480 answer (≈ Jul-Aug 2023). External debt comprises borrowings from multilateral and bilateral agencies (World Bank, ADB, JICA, KfW etc.) routed through the Centre and back-to-back-loaned to states. The reference year is the latest available outstanding stock at the time of answer (likely end-March 2023); the source PDF should be consulted for the exact reference date.
